reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the backdrop and split depth bands into parallax child sprites during scene assembly.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_dungeon_backdrop_parallax_1280x720.png through AssetServer during level setup and assign it to the ShaftBackdrop root entity.
runtime_notes: Background layers scroll at 0.2, 0.4, 0.7, and 1.0 camera speed ratios.
Nearest-neighbor sampling and integer translation preserve tile edges during long descents.
The center void stays darker than the side walls so moving hazards read at one glance.

context.usage: Primary stage backdrop for the full descent, with four depth bands that sustain pressure without any progress marker.

shape.silhouette: Four-layer dungeon shaft with stone arches, chain silhouettes, damp alcoves, and a center void that descends beyond the lower frame.

specs.lighting: Cold torch pockets and a heavy center shadow maintain downward tension across all zones.

acceptance_criteria: Backdrop contains four readable depth bands with the center shaft kept open for obstacle silhouettes.
The brightest torch accent never exceeds 5 percent of total frame area, preserving the low-key dungeon mood.
